query:
SELECT 
  id,
  sport,
  game_date,
  away_team,
  home_team,
  start_time_est,
  game_status,
  away_score,
  home_score,
  away_book_spread,
  home_book_spread,
  book_total,
  away_ml,
  home_ml,
  spread_away_bets_pct,
  spread_away_money_pct,
  total_over_bets_pct,
  total_over_money_pct,
  ml_away_bets_pct,
  ml_away_money_pct,
  sort_order,
  published_to_feed,
  published_model,
  away_model_spread,
  home_model_spread,
  model_total,
  model_away_ml,
  created_at,
  updated_at
FROM games
WHERE sport = 'NHL'
ORDER BY game_date, sort_order, start_time_est;
